final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand identity system showcase for "染秋 (RAN QIU)", a Chinese autumn fragrance brand.

Style/medium: needs an "国风" (Chinese-style) aesthetic with Eastern philosophical sensibility — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include three distinct panels or sections arranged clearly: primary color / secondary color / typography specifications
Subject: must include the brand name "染秋" and "RAN QIU" as the central identity element
Scene/backdrop: needs an autumn-inspired visual context — exact environmental details are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, contemplative autumn atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: must include autumn-inspired hues derived from osmanthus, persimmon, maple leaves, and oolong tea — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a refined, artisanal surface treatment reflecting traditional Chinese dyeing craft — exact material choice is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋", "RAN QIU", and fragrance names "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: must preserve the Eastern philosophical brand positioning, autumn seasonal theme, and traditional craft aesthetic
Avoid:
